kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Is
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL is ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${product_name} = Xiaomi Power Bank 4i 20000mAh 33W Super Fast Charging PD |Smart 12 Layer Protection|Type C Input & Output|Triple Output Ports|Supports Android,Apple, Tablets, Earbuds,Watch(MI Powerbank),Black
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Switch Window
kw.doc: Switches to browser window matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'Xiaomi Power Bank 4i 20000mAh 33W Super Fast Charging PD |Smart 12 Layer Protection|Type C Input & Output|Triple Output Ports|Supports Android,Apple, Tablets, Earbuds,Watch(MI Powerbank),Black'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'Xiaomi Power Bank 4i 20000mAh 33W Super Fast Charging PD |Smart 12 Layer Protection|Type C Input & Output|Triple Output Ports|Supports Android,Apple, Tablets, Earbuds,Watch(MI Powerbank),Black'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
